bodySample: Introducing Oatmeal Our new multi-theme marketing site kit UI Blocks Templates UI Kit Sign in Get full access UI KIT BY THE MAKERS OF TAILWIND CSS Meet Catalyst, a beautiful, UI kit built with React and Tailwind CSS React Headless UI Move as fast as you can with a UI library without compromising on your own vision with modern UI components that are part of your own codebase. Documentation Get UI kit Every pixel designed with intent Not too trendy, not too plain — Catalyst finds the perfect middle ground, blending depth, clarity, and motion into an interface that’s as intuitive as it is beautiful. Live preview BUILT FOR DEVELOPERS What’s included Catalyst is a modern application UI kit built with Tailwind CSS, Headless UI and React, designed and built by the Tailwind CSS team. It's a collection of beautiful, production-ready UI components you drop into your projects alongside your own code that are yours to customize, adapt, and make your own. Skip all the time you'd spend building your own buttons, form controls, dialogs, tables, dropdown menus, and more and hit the ground running with carefully crafted component APIs that are a delight to use. Built by experts — you can trust that all of the code is written following Tailwind CSS best practices, because it’s written by the same team who created and maintain the framework. Easy to customize — everything is styled with utility c
